action: `evolve phase verify router` ALWAYS fails on a fresh cycle because the router deliverable contract and the actual Plan-mode artifact format disagree. contract_registry.go:137 declares the router entry ArtifactName=routing-plan.json, KindJSON, RequiredKeys=["plan"] — it expects a JSON OBJECT {"plan": [...]}. But PhaseAdvisor.Plan (phase_advisor.go:107) writes routing-plan.json as a BARE JSON ARRAY: composePlanPrompt/buildPlanPrompt instruct 'write your whole-cycle plan as a strict JSON array', and parsePhasePlan (phase_advisor.go:601) reads it back via lastBalancedSpan('[',']'), extracting the last balanced array ANYWHERE in the text — so it never required a top-level object. Result: the agent-callable self-check (and the host-side contract gate, which shares deliverable.VerifyWith) reports '[invalid_json] not valid JSON object: json: cannot unmarshal array into Go value of type map[string]json.RawMessage'. Reproduced live in cycle-318 (routing-plan.json was a bare array -> verify exit 1). Worked around this cycle by wrapping the array under a top-level "plan" key (parsePhasePlan still finds the inner array via lastBalancedSpan, so the runtime is unaffected), but the persona prompt + parsePhasePlan still emit/expect a bare array, so EVERY subsequent cycle re-breaks. Fix direction (pick one, TDD-pin both verify and parse): (a) change the Plan-mode wire format to {"plan":[...]} — update composePlanPrompt/buildPlanPrompt persona text AND tighten parsePhasePlan to read .plan; (b) change the contract_registry router entry to a kind/required-keys matching a bare top-level array. Option (a) aligns with the contract's stated RequiredKeys and with the per-step routing-proposal.json (which Propose()/parseProposal already consume as an object); (b) is the smaller diff. Acceptance: a freshly-written routing-plan.json passes `evolve phase verify router` with exit 0 WITHOUT a manual wrap, and parsePhasePlan still round-trips the whole-cycle plan. NOTE: the per-step router deliverable (routing-proposal.json, {next_phase,insert_phases,justification}) is NOT affected — only the whole-cycle Plan artifact and its contract.
evidence_pointer: go/internal/phasecontract/contract_registry.go:137-139 (router RequiredKeys=[plan]); go/internal/core/phase_advisor.go:107 (Plan writes routing-plan.json), :138 (buildPlanPrompt 'strict JSON array'), :593-611 (parsePhasePlan lastBalancedSpan); go/cmd/evolve/cmd_phase_verify.go (runPhaseVerify -> deliverable.VerifyWith); .evolve/runs/cycle-318/routing-plan.json (wrapped this cycle to pass)
